hooks.name: useTelemetryStream
hooks.description: SSE listener capturing active database connections, CPU/memory profiles, and active goroutines, returning a nominal runtime telemetry object.

hooks.name: useEcologyStream
hooks.description: Streams NOAA and Copernicus pipeline lifecycle statuses with fallback offline polling at 15-second intervals on failure.

hooks.name: useRuntimeStream
hooks.description: Low-level system metrics consumer monitoring scheduler loop statuses and event depth.

hooks.name: useTruthStream
hooks.description: Streams residual deltas and observed consensus deviations directly from the truth feedback loop.

hooks.name: use-api
hooks.description: Unified Axios client queries fetching scheduler rates, DB audits, provider consensus weights, and active system alerts.

middleware.name: middleware.ts
middleware.description: Edge middleware validation checking authorization tokens, redirecting unauthenticated requests targeting protected routes back to login.

schemas.name: telemetry.ts
schemas.description: Declares typing schemas including ExperimentalPhysicsOutput, ForecastResidual, EcologySnapshot, RuntimeSnapshot, and ReplayMismatch.
